notes: ABANDONED — too slow on external drive. 422GB on /Volumes/AI_Model_Drive causes ~20+ min/test (vs 56s for 6-bit in RAM). Thinking mode spirals also required fixing both chat_template.jinja AND tokenizer_config.json (LM Studio reads tokenizer_config.json chat_template, not .jinja). Not viable for benchmarking. Use 6-bit (301GB, fits in RAM) instead.
